creator: 2khramtsov@gmail.com
text:
Upstream pushes EGL import, double free and memory leak fixes, without
publishing timely releases, e.g.:
https://gitlab.freedesktop.org/glvnd/libglvnd/-/compare/v1.4.0...master
https://gitlab.freedesktop.org/glvnd/libglvnd/-/tags

Maybe switch this port to snapshots? I'm not using this port so not interested
to see if some changes could be backported or to request an exp-run for update.
